posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to hide, move, customize subitem columns within the various table widgets.

What are you trying to achieve

At the moment, there is nothing that can be done with subitems in the various table widgets. I would like the ability to hide, move, and customize the subitem level of the various table widgets.
